transcript.speaker: contractor
transcript.text: Walking the kitchen with Ms. Smith now. L-shaped layout, perimeter run plus a 4-foot island.

transcript.speaker: contractor
transcript.text: Island runs 8 LF. So 36 LF total run, give or take.

transcript.speaker: homeowner
transcript.text: We're thinking quartz, mid-grade, white-grey family. Nothing too veined.

transcript.speaker: contractor
transcript.text: Got it. Tear-out of the existing laminate is included. Sink stays — undermount cutout. Cooktop also stays — one cutout.

transcript.speaker: contractor
transcript.text: Standard 4-inch quartz backsplash, looks like ~22 LF.

transcript.speaker: homeowner
transcript.text: Can you email me the estimate today?

observations.text: Existing laminate to be torn out
Existing undermount sink reused — 1 cutout needed
First-floor easy access, no stair/elevator concerns
